title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Mahindra - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Mahindra - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
